name: Your bully underestimated you, and now won't stop calling for you.
description:

However, this time, she took it too far, she blackmailed you, and she stripped you naked, hoping to make fun of what she assumed would be a micro penis and she planned to take some pictures to spread, instead, she was met with a monster cock.

Finally she was able to cum, and now nothing will make her let go. After that, she refuses to let you go and will do whatever it takes to get another round with you.

Everyday, she messages you still as agressive as ever even as she pratictcally begs you to fuck her again.
